targets.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM query_metric_snapshots
  WHERE db_identifier = '${db_identifier}'
    AND captured_at BETWEEN to_timestamp($__from / 1000.0) AND to_timestamp($__to / 1000.0)
), start_snap AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT f.*, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY queryid, dbid, userid ORDER BY captured_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM filtered AS f
  ) AS t
  WHERE rn = 1
), end_snap AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT f.*, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY queryid, dbid, userid ORDER BY captured_at DESC) AS rn
    FROM filtered AS f
  ) AS t
  WHERE rn = 1
), deltas AS (
  SELECT
    e.queryid,
    e.dbid,
    e.userid,
    left(e.query, 240) AS query,
    GREATEST(e.calls - COALESCE(s.calls, e.calls), 0) AS calls_delta,
    GREATEST(e.total_exec_time_ms - COALESCE(s.total_exec_time_ms, e.total_exec_time_ms), 0) AS total_exec_time_ms_delta,
    CASE
      WHEN GREATEST(e.calls - COALESCE(s.calls, e.calls), 0) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE GREATEST(e.total_exec_time_ms - COALESCE(s.total_exec_time_ms, e.total_exec_time_ms), 0)
        / NULLIF(GREATEST(e.calls - COALESCE(s.calls, e.calls), 0), 0)
    END AS mean_exec_time_ms_delta
  FROM end_snap AS e
  LEFT JOIN start_snap AS s USING (queryid, dbid, userid)
), cleaned AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM deltas
  WHERE (total_exec_time_ms_delta > 0 OR calls_delta > 0)
    AND query IS NOT NULL
    AND query !~* '^(BEGIN|COMMIT|ROLLBACK|SET\s|SHOW\s|UNLISTEN|CLOSE\s|SELECT\s+pg_)'
    AND query NOT ILIKE '%query_metric_snapshots%'
    AND query NOT ILIKE '%runtime_%'
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    (100.0 * total_exec_time_ms_delta / NULLIF(sum(total_exec_time_ms_delta) OVER (), 0)) AS share_pct
  FROM cleaned
)
SELECT
  queryid,
  dbid,
  userid,
  query,
  calls_delta,
  round(total_exec_time_ms_delta::numeric, 2) AS total_exec_time_ms_delta,
  round(COALESCE(mean_exec_time_ms_delta, 0)::numeric, 2) AS mean_exec_time_ms_delta,
  round(COALESCE(share_pct, 0)::numeric, 2) AS share_pct
FROM ranked
ORDER BY total_exec_time_ms_delta DESC
LIMIT ${limit};

panels.title: Top Queries by Total Time Delta

targets.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM query_metric_snapshots
  WHERE db_identifier = '${db_identifier}'
    AND captured_at BETWEEN to_timestamp($__from / 1000.0) AND to_timestamp($__to / 1000.0)
), start_snap AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT f.*, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY queryid, dbid, userid ORDER BY captured_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM filtered AS f
  ) AS t
  WHERE rn = 1
), end_snap AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT f.*, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY queryid, dbid, userid ORDER BY captured_at DESC) AS rn
    FROM filtered AS f
  ) AS t
  WHERE rn = 1
), deltas AS (
  SELECT
    e.queryid,
    e.dbid,
    e.userid,
    left(e.query, 180) AS query,
    GREATEST(e.calls - COALESCE(s.calls, e.calls), 0) AS calls_delta
  FROM end_snap AS e
  LEFT JOIN start_snap AS s USING (queryid, dbid, userid)
)
SELECT
  queryid,
  dbid,
  userid,
  query,
  calls_delta
FROM deltas
WHERE calls_delta > 0
  AND query IS NOT NULL
  AND query !~* '^(BEGIN|COMMIT|ROLLBACK|SET\s|SHOW\s|UNLISTEN|CLOSE\s|SELECT\s+pg_)'
  AND query NOT ILIKE '%query_metric_snapshots%'
  AND query NOT ILIKE '%runtime_%'
ORDER BY calls_delta DESC
LIMIT ${limit};

SELECT
  min(captured_at) AS snapshot_start_at,
  max(captured_at) AS snapshot_end_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - max(captured_at)))::bigint AS freshness_seconds,
  count(*) AS rows_in_window,
  count(DISTINCT queryid) AS distinct_queries
FROM query_metric_snapshots
WHERE db_identifier = '${db_identifier}'
  AND captured_at BETWEEN to_timestamp($__from / 1000.0) AND to_timestamp($__to / 1000.0);

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM query_metric_snapshots
  WHERE db_identifier = '${db_identifier}'
    AND captured_at BETWEEN to_timestamp($__from / 1000.0) AND to_timestamp($__to / 1000.0)
), start_snap AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT f.*, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY queryid, dbid, userid ORDER BY captured_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM filtered AS f
  ) AS t
  WHERE rn = 1
), end_snap AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT f.*, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY queryid, dbid, userid ORDER BY captured_at DESC) AS rn
    FROM filtered AS f
  ) AS t
  WHERE rn = 1
), deltas AS (
  SELECT
    e.queryid,
    e.dbid,
    e.userid,
    left(e.query, 180) AS query,
    GREATEST(e.calls - COALESCE(s.calls, e.calls), 0) AS calls_delta,
    CASE
      WHEN GREATEST(e.calls - COALESCE(s.calls, e.calls), 0) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE GREATEST(e.total_exec_time_ms - COALESCE(s.total_exec_time_ms, e.total_exec_time_ms), 0)
        / NULLIF(GREATEST(e.calls - COALESCE(s.calls, e.calls), 0), 0)
    END AS mean_exec_time_ms_delta
  FROM end_snap AS e
  LEFT JOIN start_snap AS s USING (queryid, dbid, userid)
)
SELECT
  queryid,
  dbid,
  userid,
  query,
  calls_delta,
  round(COALESCE(mean_exec_time_ms_delta, 0)::numeric, 2) AS mean_exec_time_ms_delta
FROM deltas
WHERE calls_delta >= 5
  AND mean_exec_time_ms_delta IS NOT NULL
  AND query IS NOT NULL
  AND query !~* '^(BEGIN|COMMIT|ROLLBACK|SET\s|SHOW\s|UNLISTEN|CLOSE\s|SELECT\s+pg_)'
  AND query NOT ILIKE '%query_metric_snapshots%'
  AND query NOT ILIKE '%runtime_%'
ORDER BY mean_exec_time_ms_delta DESC
LIMIT ${limit};
